rulings.Case Title: AGATON GUALBERTO ET AL VS. OCWEN LOAN SERVICING LLC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendants Mortgage Electronic Registration Systems, Inc., Ocwen Loan Servicing, Llc, Deutsche Bank National Trust Company, As Trustee'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for SEP 04, 2018 line 5. Defendants Mortgage Electronic Registration Systems, Inc., Ocwen Loan Servicing, Llc, Deutsche Bank National Trust Company, As Trustee'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint sustained without leave to amend as to all causes of action as alleged. This action is premature. Plaintiff attempts to, through various causes of action, challenge Deutsche Bank's authority/standing to foreclose pre-foreclosure. This challenge is not allowed under California law. If Plaintiff can and wishes in good faith to allege a declaratory relief cause of action against all potential parties to the contracts (Deed of Trust, Note, etc) to determine who the payments have to be made to, the Court will grant a leave to amend to allege such cause of action and to add all entities identified in paragraphs 8-16 of First Amended Complaint as parties to this action. Defendant to prepare order sustaining demurrer with leave to amend. Plaintiff to prepare order sustaining demurrer with leave to amend as outlined above. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: DUKE PARTNERS II, LLC VS. KEYHAN MOHANNA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Discovery Protective Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for SEP 04, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT KEYHAN MOHANNA's Motion For Discovery Protective Order DENIED in part; Hearing Required in part. Motion to stay discovery is DENIED. Hearing Required to address the location of the deposition. No later than 9:00 a.m. Defendant to file a declaration under the penalty of perjury by Defendant's physician identifying the maximum distance Mr. Mohanna is to travel for medical reasons and that Mr. Mohanna cannot travel as far as Concord, CA. (In the alternative, Mr. Mohanna's physician may appear at the hearing). Deposition is to proceed on September 6, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. Mr. Mohanna is also to comply with Court's prior order re: production of documents by 9:00 a.m. on September 6, 2018. The Court will determine whether deposition will proceed at the location previously identified or at a designated location in the Civic Center Courthouse based on the outcome of the hearing. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: MADHAV SURI ET AL VS. NORTH PING YUEN, L.P. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for SEP 04, 2018 line 2. PLAINTIFFs MADHAV SURI and ANURADHA SURI's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication GRANTED, subject to opposition. Pursuant to the Notice of Motion Plaintiff is seeking a judgment for possession in this action without any limitations. There are two defendants in this action. Defendant North Ping Yuen L.P. filed a non-opposition to granting summary judgment. Moving party to prepare order and form of judgment. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: HOWARD TOM VS. DAN WANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for SEP 04, 2018 line 4. DEFENDANT DAN WANG Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient Notice per CCP 1005 and Court's August 29, 2018 order. = (501/CFH)
